metadata.title: The Look Of Love, Pt.1
metadata.lyrics:
[00:00.41] Aah, aah, aah
[00:12.44] Mmm, mmm
[00:14.26] Whoa, whoa, whoa
[00:15.52] When your world is full of strange arrangements
[00:20.02] And gravity won't pull you through
[00:24.03] You know you're missing out on something
[00:27.61] Well that something depends on you
[00:33.67] (All I'm saying) It takes a lot to love you
[00:37.23] (All I'm doing) You know it's true
[00:39.73] (All I mean now) There's one thing, yes, one thing
[00:43.83] That turns this gray sky to blue
[00:47.68] (That's the look, that's the look)
[00:50.85] The look of love
[00:52.09] (That's the look, that's the look)
[00:54.84] The look of love
[00:56.79] (That's the look, that's the look)
[00:58.87] The look of love
[01:03.28] When your girl has left you out on the pavement (Goodbye!)
[01:07.58] Then your dreams fall apart at the seams
[01:11.70] Your reason for living's your reason for leaving
[01:15.83] Don't ask me what it means
[01:19.38] (Who got the look?) I don't know the answer to that question
[01:23.36] (Where's the look?) If I knew I would tell you
[01:27.66] (What's the look?) The look for your information
[01:31.21] Yes, there's one thing, the one thing that still holds true
[01:34.84] (What's that?)
[01:34.84] (That's the look, that's the look)
[01:38.57] The look of love
[01:39.81] (That's the look, that's the look)
[01:42.45] The look of love
[01:44.68] (That's the look, that's the look)
[01:46.53] The look of love
[01:49.09] Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa
[02:08.35] (That's the look, that's the look)
[02:10.36] The look of love
[02:11.21] (That's the look, that's the look)
[02:14.38] The look of love
[02:15.77] (That's the look, that's the look)
[02:18.39] The look of love, look of love
[02:23.51] If you judge a book by the cover
[02:27.41] Then you'd judge the look by the lover
[02:31.42] I hope you'll soon recover
[02:35.49] Me, I go from one extreme to another
[02:39.76] And though my friends just might ask me
[02:42.52] They say, "Martin, maybe one day you'll find true love"
[02:45.13] I say, "Maybe, there must be a solution
[02:50.95] To the one thing, the one thing, we can't find"
[02:56.10] (That's the look, that's the look)
[02:58.11] Sisters and brothers
[03:00.04] (That's the look, that's the look)
[03:01.90] Should help each other
[03:04.24] (That's the look, that's the look)
[03:05.12] Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh
[03:09.17] Heaven's above
[03:12.41] (That's the look, that's the look)
[03:13.43] Hip-hip hooray!
[03:15.92] (That's the look, that's the look)
[03:17.13] Yippee-ai, yippee-aiay!
[03:19.71] (That's the look, that's the look)
[03:22.14] (Be lucky in love)
[03:25.38] Look of love!
[03:26.50]
